title: Folder automations and additional subfolders
excerpt:
It would be helpful to have an automation that moves completed boards to different folder or to archive that completed board. (Right now we can only auto-archive items.) 
It would also be helpful to have multiple subfold…

posts.author: RHSM (Stacie de Jongh)
posts.cookedHtml:
It would be helpful to have an automation that moves completed boards to different folder or to archive that completed board. (Right now we can only auto-archive items.)

It would also be helpful to have multiple subfolder levels.

posts.author: leeqiqi (Lee Qi Qi)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi, I would also like to requests for up to 4 levels of subfolder directory and automations for template boards to be created in specified folders.
